response: The "Virtual Choir"-noted conductor who has created works for the Austin-based ensemble Conspirare is Eric Whitacre. He is known for his "Virtual Choir" projects, where he brings individual voices from around the world together into an online choir. Whitacre has collaborated with Conspirare, and his work with the ensemble includes the Grammy-nominated album "The Sacred Spirit of Russia" (2015), which won the Grammy Award for Best Choral Performance.
